text:
The following are some of the locations and landmarks in the Attack on Titan universe.

Paradis Island

Wall Maria

{| style="border: 1px solid #FFF; border-radius: 2ex 2ex 2ex 2ex;" border="1" width="100%"
!Name
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="50%" |Description
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex 1.5ex 0ex 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="25%" |Appearance
|-
|Shiganshina District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a district on the south side of Wall Maria. It is where Eren Yeager, Mikasa Ackerman and Armin Arlert lived before it was destroyed by the Colossus Titan and the Armored Titan.
| 
|-
|Titan Forest
| style="padding: 5px;" |
There are several in the area encompassed by Wall Maria as well as outside of the Walls. These forests are comprised of many huge trees standing at about 80 meters, making their high branches ideal hiding places from Titans who are unable to climb the trees. The Survey Corps used one of these forests within Wall Maria to set a trap for the Female Titan.
|
|}
 

Wall Rose

{| style="border: 1px solid #FFF; border-radius: 2ex 2ex 2ex 2ex;" border="1" width="100%"
!Name
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="50%" |Description
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex 1.5ex 0ex 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="25%" |Appearance
|-
|Utopia District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a district located on the north side of Wall Rose.
|
|-
|Karanes District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a district on the eastern side of Wall Rose. It is the residence of Nile Dok's family and the home of Mina Carolina. Karanes is the launching point of the Survey Corps 57th expedition as well as the place they return to afterward.
|
|-
|Trost District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a district on the south side of Wall Rose. It is the home of several members of the 104th Training Corps such as Jean Kirstein and Thomas Wagner. Five years after the destruction of Shiganshina the Colossus Titan breaches Trost as well, effectively making Trost the site of an eventually thwarted Titan incursion. Later, Hange Zoë tests her new Executioner from Hell in Trost.
|
|-
|Krolva District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a district located by Wall Rose, close to Trost District.
|
|-
|Ragako
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a town in the southern area of the land surrounded by Wall Rose. It is the hometown of Connie Springer. When the Beast Titan comes inside the Walls he turns the inhabitants of Ragako into Titans.
| 
|-
|Dauper
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a small settlement in the southern area of the land surrounded by Wall Rose. It lies in a mountain forest and traditionally sustains itself by hunting, though it has recently turned more towards farming and horse-breeding to support the larger population caused by the influx of refugees from Wall Maria. It is the home of Sasha Blouse.
| 
|-
|Jinae
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a town in the southern area of the land surrounded by Wall Rose. It is the home of Marco Bott.
|
|-
|Utgard Castle
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is an abandoned castle close to the inner side of Wall Rose. It contains large quantities of old food supplies, including liquor and cans of herring with strange writing on them. It is the site of a large Titan attack during the Beast Titan's incursion.
| 
|-
|Reiss Chapel
| style="padding: 5px;" |
The Reiss Chapel was a church owned by the Reiss family. On the surface, it appeared to be a regular church that the Reiss family frequently prayed in, but below the surface it served as the site where all the Reiss succession rituals took place.
| 
|}
 

Wall Sheena

{| style="border: 1px solid #FFF; border-radius: 2ex 2ex 2ex 2ex;" border="1" width="100%"
!Name
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="50%" |Description
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex 1.5ex 0ex 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="25%" |Appearance
|-
|Stohess District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is the eastern district of Wall Sheena. The Monarchy once began constructing an underground city there, but the effort was abandoned in the end, leaving several unused tunnels below the city. The Survey Corps set a trap for the Female Titan in this district.
| 
|-
|Ehrmich District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is the southern district of Wall Sheena. When Wall Rose is believed to have been breached a large number of refugees pass through Ehrmich, an event witnessed by several Survey Corps members and Minister Nick.
| 
|-
|Yarckel District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is the western district of Wall Sheena.
|
|-
|Orvud District
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is the northern district of Wall Sheena. Orvud is where Rod Reiss in his Titan form is immediately drawn to due to the large number of people residing there.
| 
|-
|Mitras
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is the city within Wall Sheena. It serves as the capital, where the nobility resides and government affairs take place.
| 
|-
|Underground
| style="padding: 5px;" |
The Underground is the poverty-stricken city beneath Mitras and other districts of Wall Sheena. Levi Ackerman was born and raised in this environment until he left to join the Survey Corps.
| 
|}
 

Marley

{| style="border: 1px solid #FFF; border-radius: 2ex 2ex 2ex 2ex;" border="1" width="100%"
!Name
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="50%" |Description
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex 1.5ex 0ex 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="25%" |Appearance
|-
|Liberio
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a city that contains an for the Eldians who stayed on the continent after the Great Titan War. The Marley government forces them to live there and they cannot leave without permission. It is the home of the Warriors, including Reiner Braun, Bertolt Hoover, Annie Leonhart, and Zeke Yeager.
|
|-
|Lakua
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 was a city in western Marley which contained a military base.
|-
|Lago
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 was a large city located in Marley. It fell over 1200 years ago over the course of a single day when Titans appeared and destroyed the city and the citizens within it.
|
|-
|Odiha
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a Marleyan city located on the continental mainland's southern border.
|
|-
|Karifa
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 was a Marleyan naval port located on the continental mainland's northern coast.
|
|-
|Fort Salta
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a Marleyan fortification and research base in the southern mountainous region of the continental mainland.
|
|}

Mid-East Allied Forces

{| style="border: 1px solid #FFF; border-radius: 2ex 2ex 2ex 2ex;" border="1" width="100%"
!Name
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="50%" |Description
! style="background: black; border-radius: 0ex 1.5ex 0ex 0ex; color: #FFF;" width="25%" |Appearance
|-
|Fort Slava
| style="padding: 5px;" |
 is a fortress of the Mid-East Allied Forces near the coast of the continental mainland. It is heavily fortified with many cannons and anti-Titan artillery.
|
|}

References

Navigation
